title: periploca tsiangii
intro: Periploca tsiangii is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the Tsiang's periploca. It is a woody vine native to China, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits, including antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. In herbal preparations, Periploca tsiangii is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
